## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential Chief of Staff role for Brett at Marcel's rapidly growing AI-powered growth agency.](https://fathom.video/share/uB-LfPBHZ4Qn_5YyGQyrBTeFd8iecSzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company has experienced explosive growth, reaching $4M+ ARR in just a few months](https://fathom.video/share/uB-LfPBHZ4Qn_5YyGQyrBTeFd8iecSzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Brett's background in scaling operations and bridging client/product needs aligns well with current challenges](https://fathom.video/share/uB-LfPBHZ4Qn_5YyGQyrBTeFd8iecSzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [The role may evolve beyond traditional Chief of Staff duties, potentially focusing on product/systems development](https://fathom.video/share/uB-LfPBHZ4Qn_5YyGQyrBTeFd8iecSzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [Both see AI-powered hybrid management models as the future of consulting/agency work](https://fathom.video/share/uB-LfPBHZ4Qn_5YyGQyrBTeFd8iecSzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)

## Topics

### Company Growth and Current Challenges

  - [Rapid growth: Added $1M ARR in November, $1.2M in December, now over $4M ARR](https://fathom.video/share/uB-LfPBHZ4Qn_5YyGQyrBTeFd8iecSzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [38 deals in pipeline, booking clients for February and beyond](https://fathom.video/share/uB-LfPBHZ4Qn_5YyGQyrBTeFd8iecSzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Scaling challenges: staffing accounts, improving workflows, bridging account and technology sides](https://fathom.video/share/uB-LfPBHZ4Qn_5YyGQyrBTeFd8iecSzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Goal: Reach 1000 accounts as quickly as possible while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/uB-LfPBHZ4Qn_5YyGQyrBTeFd8iecSzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Current structure: 5 pods with pod leads (managing editors) and 2-3 team members each](https://fathom.video/share/uB-LfPBHZ4Qn_5YyGQyrBTeFd8iecSzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Brett's Experience and Potential Fit

  - [Previous role at Basement: Scaled from startup to $3.6M ARR, focusing on growth and operations](https://fathom.video/share/uB-LfPBHZ4Qn_5YyGQyrBTeFd8iecSzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Strengths: Bridging high-level strategy and hands-on execution, building scalable systems](https://fathom.video/share/uB-LfPBHZ4Qn_5YyGQyrBTeFd8iecSzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [Experience in sales, solution architecture, and cross-functional team management](https://fathom.video/share/uB-LfPBHZ4Qn_5YyGQyrBTeFd8iecSzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Interest in being at the intersection of client needs and business operations](https://fathom.video/share/uB-LfPBHZ4Qn_5YyGQyrBTeFd8iecSzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Potential Role and Responsibilities

  - [Less focus on traditional Chief of Staff duties, more on product/systems development](https://fathom.video/share/uB-LfPBHZ4Qn_5YyGQyrBTeFd8iecSzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [Bridging account management and technology sides of the business](https://fathom.video/share/uB-LfPBHZ4Qn_5YyGQyrBTeFd8iecSzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [Implementing accountability systems and standardizing processes](https://fathom.video/share/uB-LfPBHZ4Qn_5YyGQyrBTeFd8iecSzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Developing training programs to upskill team members](https://fathom.video/share/uB-LfPBHZ4Qn_5YyGQyrBTeFd8iecSzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [Contributing to high-level strategy while also executing on tactical improvements](https://fathom.video/share/uB-LfPBHZ4Qn_5YyGQyrBTeFd8iecSzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)

### Industry Outlook and Company Vision

  - [Both see AI-powered hybrid management models as the future of consulting/agency work](https://fathom.video/share/uB-LfPBHZ4Qn_5YyGQyrBTeFd8iecSzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Company trending towards $15M ARR by year-end, aiming for rapid scaling to 1000 accounts](https://fathom.video/share/uB-LfPBHZ4Qn_5YyGQyrBTeFd8iecSzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Focus on delivering great value while improving internal systems and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/uB-LfPBHZ4Qn_5YyGQyrBTeFd8iecSzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to call Brett directly after a short break to continue the discussion](https://fathom.video/share/uB-LfPBHZ4Qn_5YyGQyrBTeFd8iecSzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)
  - [Further explore potential role fit and specific responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/uB-LfPBHZ4Qn_5YyGQyrBTeFd8iecSzZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
